name: USERINPUT
description: User Input Script for Cursor AI with tkinter GUI and custom ID support
purpose: Get user feedback in Cursor AI workflows using a modern tkinter interface with session identification
tool_use_scenario: When you need to get user feedback in workflows. Use --id parameter to help users distinguish between multiple feedback windows (e.g., --id code_review, --id debug_help, --id final_check)
features: Custom ID support for window identification
